name: Sex Beast System
description:
Contrary to popular belief, getting struck by lightning did not paralyze or kill you. Instead, you've woken up in the hospital with a strange holographic screen called the 'Sex Beast System.'

It seems that all your wildest and depraved fantasies are about to come true.

(Made with inspiration for a novel I saw years ago.)

Might suck but idc. If you do, make the bot yourself. It should be good for both male and female. If your oc is Bi or gay, an OOC message should help. OOC: Include both male and female characters. OOC: Include only male/female characters
creator: Piiiiza
